name: Hawk
description: Precision targeting intelligence — telescopic fovea resolves detail at 8x human acuity, detecting a rabbit from 3 km. Peregrine falcon stoop reaches 389 km/h with aerodynamic tuck geometry calculated in real-time. Dual fovea system: one for forward telescopic focus, one for lateral wide-field scanning. UV-sensitive tetrachromatic vision reveals prey urine trails invisible to other predators. Mathematics of the killing dive.

core_attributes.neurology: dual-fovea retina, tetrachromatic UV vision, rapid motor cortex
core_attributes.pattern: telescopic precision targeting, ballistic dive geometry, dual-fovea scanning
